ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MARCO PEREZ'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE PLAINTIFF CREDITOR IS TO RECEIVE $25 PER PAY PERIOD. THE SHERIFF IS TO RETURN THE BALANCE OF THE FUNDS TO DEFENDANT DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/EHG

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Marco Perez's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption - The motion is granted in part. The plaintiff creditor is to receive $25 per pay period. The sheriff is to return the balance of the funds to defendant debtor. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
